title: Storage daemon hard-codes system etcd path
preconditions: etcd is not installed exactly at /usr/bin/etcd
impact: The executable path is not configuration-driven and fails before storage service starts when packaging/layout differs
evidence: Deployment failure or unavailable storage; no evidence of data corruption
remediation: Impact depends on deployment packaging; not a remote exploit
regression_test: Use validated configured executable path or fail-fast preflight with packaging test
responsible_disclosure: Run storage startup with relocated etcd and assert deterministic diagnostic

title: Command-file YAML uses PyYAML Loader
direct_observation: Loader permits Python-specific constructors; signature checks and container provenance may constrain attacker input
technical_reasoning: Potential code execution if attacker can cause a signed/accepted YAML payload; not reproduced
evidence: Requires reachable attacker-controlled signed content and exact PyYAML behavior
limitations: Use SafeLoader plus explicit constructors and negative tests
remediation: Test malicious tags in isolated parser with unsigned and signed fixtures
regression_test: Responsible disclosure only if trust boundary permits unsigned attacker input

title: Published build relies on external etcd executable
preconditions: Source starts etcd and creates data dir but Phase 2 could not reconstruct expected archive
direct_observation: The service assumes an external etcd binary and deployment-specific layout
technical_reasoning: Independent build cannot produce a complete installable storage service from source alone
impact: Reports dependency provenance and Phase 3 reconstructed-build
evidence: evidence is source/dependency audit; no claim about production package
limitations: Publish exact etcd bundle metadata and preflight/version checks
remediation: Packaging test asserting binary provenance and startup
